title: clematis tengchongensis
intro: Clematis tengchongensis, also known as the Tengchong clematis, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Clematis. It is a perennial vine native to the Yunnan province in China, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Clematis tengchongensis include dried roots, which can be decocted in water to make a tea, or combined with other herbs to create a medicinal syrup.
